name: Cms
description: Mini CMS (content management system) Module for DCP to help manage all frontend content like Landing page, Blog, Contact Us & many other pages.

governance.fsm_n_a_reason: CMS é conteúdo estático/blog/leads — sem máquina de estados de negócio (sale_processes/repair). LGPD audit trail via spatie/activitylog cobre histórico (ADR 0094 §5 SoC: FSM é pro pipeline transacional).
governance.wave_18_saturation: 2026-05-16 — D4 Services (CmsPageService, CmsLeadService, SiteContentService) + CmsPageRepository extraídos; D2 Pest +22 tests (Service architecture, FormRequest validation, Repository contract).

lgpd_compliance.activity_log_note: Entities CmsPage, CmsPageMeta, CmsSiteDetail usam Spatie LogsActivity. Lead capturado via CmsLeadService passa por PiiRedactor antes do Log::info.
lgpd_compliance.wave_compliance: Wave 17 governance v3 — D7 LGPD + Wave 18 saturação D4 (2026-05-16)
